MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Re Notice
Off Calendar Jan-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(415-732-3777)Daniel Cravens for Plaintiff/Moving party .

(415-567-9600) David Wasserman appearing for Defendant/opposing party.

ARGUED. The Court stated that this is a motion for summary judgment, instructed Mr. Cravens to comply to with CCP 437c and stated based on the supplemental issues recieved this morning there are triable issues. Mr. Wasserman argued that his clients acted within the scope of empolyment and moved to have Coleman and Stern dismissed.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS DONNA STERN, JOE COLEMAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Re Notice is denied. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar May-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shane Howarter (415-732-3777 x 105) for Plaintiff/ opposing party ARAFAT HERZALLAH.
CHRISTOPHER A. NEDEAU (415-516-4010) SPECIALLY APPEARING for Defendant/Moving party FO 347 EDDY STREET PROPERTY, LLC, THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., DONNA STERN, and JOE COLEMAN.

Hearing is held. Argued re: delay, insurance policy, waiver contradiction, agents of the landlord, wrongful acts, hearsay, lease assignment, sales contract, possession, and payment of rent. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs FO 347 EDDY STREET PROPERTY, LLC, THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., DONNA STERN, and JOE COLEMAN's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Judge: CHARLES F. HAINES, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
